chain_of_thought: Step 1: Identify role of hamsters as prey. Step 2: Prey is eaten by predators. Step 3: So hamsters can be food for animals.
Step 1: Compare universities. Step 2: Princeton and UPenn have similar difficulty. Step 3: So success at Princeton suggests success at UPenn.
Step 1: Find atomic number of hydrogen (1). Step 2: Square it (1). Step 3: Compare to 5 Spice Girls. 1 is smaller.
Step 1: Identify months of commencements (including December). Step 2: December is winter. Step 3: Winter can have frost, so it is possible.
Step 1: Note war duration (6 months). Step 2: Note llama gestation (11 months). Step 3: Two births require more time than available, so impossible.
Step 1: Compare density of pear and water. Step 2: Pear is less dense. Step 3: Less dense objects float, so pear does not sink.
